title: 海浪（單一場景真動態）
audio_prompt: gentle ocean waves rolling onto a sandy beach, rhythmic wash and retreat, soft sea foam, distant calm sea ambience, field recording, high quality, no music
video_prompt: Static aerial top-down shot of turquoise ocean waves gently rolling onto a white sand beach, white foam spreading and receding rhythmically, sun glitter on the water surface, meditative and calm, photorealistic, no camera movement
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, people, boats, camera shake, fast motion, scene change, cartoon, illustration, low quality, distortion
